Quality Education.reason: Course discusses education in the context of democracy and nationalism.

Gender Equality.reason: Explores women's roles and family dynamics in Korean society.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Discusses economic growth and neoliberalism in Korea.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Addresses nationalism and social issues in Korean society.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Covers democracy and political processes in Korea.

No Poverty.reason: Indirectly relates to economic shocks via discussion of the '1997 East Asian economic crisis' (1997년동아시아경제위기), which can increase vulnerability for the poor. (Target 1.5)

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education and promotes knowledge for global citizenship and appreciation of cultural diversity through its content. (Target 4.7)

Gender Equality.reason: Explicitly dedicates a topic to 'Family and Women' (가족과여성), examining their roles and status in society, which is central to gender equality. (Targets 5.1, 5.c)

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Directly analyzes 'Korean economic growth' (한국경제성장) and the '1997 East Asian economic crisis', addressing national economic productivity and policies. (Targets 8.1, 8.2)

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Discusses the 'modernization process' (근대화 과정) and 'internet expansion' (인터넷확산), relating to industrialization and access to information technology. (Targets 9.2, 9.c)

Reduced Inequalities.reason: A core focus is on inequality, examining 'Korean multiculturalism' (한국다문화주의), 'everyday racism' (일상적인인종주의), and 'hate sentiments' (혐오정서), directly addressing Target 10.2 and 10.3.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Fundamentally examines the 'process of political democratization' (정치적민주화의과정), 'colonial experience' (식민 경험), and national division, which are central to peace and strong institutions. (Targets 16.3, 16.6)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Discusses 'globalization' (세계화) and the '1997 East Asian economic crisis', relating to global macroeconomic stability and international policy coherence. (Target 17.13)
